---
title: "Structural_Break"
output: html_document
---
# Set Up
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(scales)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
library(gt)
library(knitr)
library(here)
library(strucchange)
```

```{r}
theme_set(
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 11),
      plot.caption  = element_text(color = "grey50", size = 9),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
)

REF_YEAR <- 2013

# Vertical-line annotations (institutional breaks)
BREAKS <- data.frame(
  x     = c(2016, 2021),
  label = c("Métropole AMP", "TH reform")
)

vlines <- function() {
  list(
    geom_vline(data = BREAKS, aes(xintercept = x),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "#E74C3C", alpha = 0.7),
    annotate("text", x = BREAKS$x + 0.15,
             y = -Inf, label = BREAKS$label,
             hjust = 0, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#E74C3C")
  )
}
```

# Data Sets
```{r}
rei <- read.csv(here("cache", "rei.csv"))
```

# Structural Break
```{r}
# Test on log base
base_ts <- ts(log(rei$base_nette), start = REF_YEAR)
 
# Chow-type break test at candidate years
cat("  Breakpoint test (Chow) at 2016 (AMP) and 2021 (TH reform):\n")
fs_2016 <- Fstats(base_ts ~ 1, from = 0.2)
print(sctest(fs_2016))
 
bp <- breakpoints(base_ts ~ 1, h = 3)
cat("  Optimal breakpoints (BIC):\n")
print(summary(bp))
 
# Visualize break test
png(here("output", "breakpoint_base.png"),
    width = 900, height = 500, res = 120)
plot(fs_2016, main = "F-statistics: structural break in TFPB base")

breakpoints(fs_2016)
dev.off()

```
```{r}
plot(fs_2016, main = "F-statistics: structural break in TFPB base")
```
